projectDescription: A distributed web application for tracking cryptocurrency prices in real-time, visualizing historical charts, comparing assets, and analyzing trends with linear regression.
keyFeatures: Real-time cryptocurrency price tracking for 10 major cryptocurrencies
Historical price variation charts with customizable time ranges
Multi-cryptocurrency comparison with normalized price overlays
Linear regression analysis for price trend prediction
Microservices architecture deployed on Google Cloud Platform
RESTful API endpoints for price data and chart generation
Automated price collection from CoinGecko API every 60 seconds
MySQL database for historical price storage
XChart library for PNG chart generation
Lightweight HTML/JavaScript frontend with responsive design
publicApiSurface: GET /status - Health check endpoint (WebServer, GraficoService, RecolectorPrecios)
GET /precios - Retrieve latest cryptocurrency prices in JSON format
GET /grafico?crypto={crypto}&horas={hours} - Generate individual price variation chart
GET /graficos-todas?horas={hours} - Generate charts for all cryptocurrencies
WebServer.java main class with HttpServer on port 8080
GraficoService.java chart generation service on port 8081
RecolectorPrecios.java price collection service on port 8082
CoinGecko API integration for price data
XChart library for chart generation (PNG format)
Frontend interface at index.html with 5 main sections
